name: Lisa's Chicken Elegante`
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap each chicken breast in a slice of ham and a thin layer of bacon to hold the ham in place. Secure with a toothpick if necessary.
2. Blend the sour cream and soup together (do not dilute the soup) and pour over the chicken breasts.
3. Bake seam side down at 350°F for 40 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken from the oven and set aside, keeping the sauce in the baking dish.
5. Cut each puff pastry package into 6 rectangles. The pastry comes folded in thirds, so cut vertically to create three equal pieces per package.
6. Place a chicken breast onto the bottom half of the pastry. Fold over the top and crimp to seal, creating a neat square packet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-30 minutes or until puffed and golden.
8. Serve hot with warmed sauce poured over.
Converted by MCBuster.
